name: Storm Front
description: A Vladof area grenade that bursts into several shock Tesla beacons on impact, combining MIRV-style splitting with sustained electrical damage. The child fields often overlap, letting enemies take damage from more than one beacon at once, and the grenade also produces a shock blast when it splits and another when the child grenades expire. Terrain can block where the children land, but once they stick they still work normally, which makes this grenade especially strong in tighter spaces.
notes:
It always rolls with a shock accessory and the Exterminator payload, which it shares with Fire Bee and Pandemic.

The red text nods to the saying that lightning never strikes twice. Kills made with Storm Front also count toward the Chemical Sprayer and Sprayowee challenges.

special.description: On impact, it spawns five child grenades that stick to surfaces. Each child emits Tesla-style shock damage in an area before detonating, though the child grenades deal reduced damage.
special.title: Sometimes lightning does strike twice.
